stemHtml:
An aircraft is flying from 55°N, 055°W to 60°N, 005°W. At a certain moment in time the true track of the aircraft is 091°.

Which statement is correct?

options.a: The aircraft has already passed the vertex.
options.b: The aircraft is following the rhumb line track of 091°.
options.c: The aircraft has not yet reached the vertex.
options.d: The aircraft is just passing the vertex.
